name: report
description: Generate consultant-grade PDF reports from wiki content or uploaded documents
author: CupBots
primitives: /report build --id <id>                    — render HTML + PDF, register preview
/report preview --id <id>                  — re-emit the hosted preview URL
/report show --id <id>                     — dump current markdown in chat
/report demo                               — build a pre-made demo instantly (no AI)
intent: Create, draft, build, edit, or preview professional consultant-grade reports (sustainability, annual, ESG). Generate PDF from wiki content or uploaded markdown/PDF/DOCX. Tweak sections with plain language. Change brand palette or signatory title.
not_intent: Sending documents via email, creating calendar events, editing wiki entities directly
config: e.g. green, navy, earth. Default: green

marketplace.tagline: Fortune 500-grade PDF reports from WhatsApp — edit with plain language
marketplace.long_description: Generate professional, print-ready PDF reports from your wiki content or uploaded documents. Uses CSS Paged Media for pixel-perfect A4 layout with automatic pagination. Tweak sections in plain English, change brand palettes, swap assets. Accepts edits via WhatsApp or email. Hosted preview URL for stakeholder review. Designed for sustainability statements, annual reports, and ESG disclosures at Big 4 consultant quality.
